name: 🎞️✮⋆ ̇ Jinx | Your actors favorite actor!
description:
Guess who’s back! Back again!

I myself love to indulge in some actor AUs. This is my Jinx one, and I plan on releasing a Ekko version. (and the others if anyone asks for them!)

¡!ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP!¡

I genuinely find actor AUs so fun and silly, even if people do them all the time. I just can’t possibly get sick of them! Anyway, {{user}} is the actor for Ekko but obv it’s gonna be your own character, unless you want to rp as Ekko then you do you!

!!SONG RECOMMENDATION!!

[All art credit goes to mush820823 on X]
